summary: PR #2313 worked on src/melee/lb/lbbgflash, adding a large amount of C for background flash and related JObj/IK math routines, updating local data typing around BgFlashData/GXColor, and changing the lbbgflash header. The bot report records 5 new matches and 8 unmatched-item improvements for main/melee/lb/lbbgflash.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation target; diff adds implementations, includes, typed BgFlashData fields, GX drawing, GObj setup, JObj matrix/quaternion helpers, and matching tactics.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbbgflash.c include additions and BgFlashData expansion
raw_diff: implementations for fn_8001FC08, fn_8001FEC4, lbBgFlash_800206D4, lbBgFlash_800208EC, fn_80020AEC, lbBgFlash_80020E38, fn_8002113C, lbBgFlash_80021410 excerpted
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for main/melee/lb/lbbgflash

key_files.role: Header touched by PR; exact header diff is not present in loaded excerpt, but changed-file metadata records 12 additions and 10 deletions.

what_changed.text: Expanded BgFlashData from a small partially typed structure into an offset-commented structure using GXColor fields for x4, x8, and xC, float arrays x10/x20, state bytes, counters, and HSD_GObj pointers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct BgFlashData changes int x4/x8/xC to GXColor x4/x8/xC and adds x10/x20/x30-x44 fields

what_changed.text: Changed lbl_804D3840, lbl_804D3844, lbl_804D3848, and lbl_804D384C extern declarations from s32 to GXColor.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: extern s32 lbl_804D3840... replaced by extern GXColor lbl_804D3840...

what_changed.text: Added library, baselib, GX, math, JObj, matrix, particle, quaternion, archive, and vector includes needed by the new source bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added includes for dolphin/gx/GXStruct.h, dolphin/gx.h, gobjplink.h, gobjuserdata.h, jobj.h, mtx.h, particle.h, quatlib.h, MSL/trigf.h, lbarchive.h, lbvector.h, MSL/math.h

what_changed.text: Implemented color interpolation/update code in fn_8001FC08 using four repeated channel blocks over x10/x20 and GXColor channel endpoints.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8001FC08 body with TODO about un-unrolling and per-channel x10/x20 updates against data->x8.r/g/b/a

what_changed.text: Implemented background flash rendering path in fn_8001FEC4 with GXBegin/GXPosition2f32/GXColor4u8 quads, mode checks, strip drawing loops, and PAD_STACK(8).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8001FEC4 body with hsd_80391A04, GX_QUADS, mode handling, y loops, strip_h, neg_y, neg_yh

what_changed.text: Updated fn_800204C8 to use BgFlashData and state.mode, and to write data->xC.r/g/b/a from data->x10[0..3] instead of byte fields on the older BgFlashData2 view.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_800204C8 changes BgFlashData2 cast to BgFlashData pointer and xC/xD/xE/xF assignments to xC.r/g/b/a

what_changed.text: Implemented lbBgFlash_800206D4 as a two-color transition initializer using GXColor inputs and per-channel step values; also changed lbBgFlash_InitState parameter from int* duration to GXColor* color in the C diff excerpt.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbBgFlash_800206D4 body and lbBgFlash_InitState signature/body change

what_changed.text: Implemented or adjusted GObj setup routines lbBgFlash_800208EC and lbBgFlash_800209F4, including CObj creation, GX link setup, proc setup, and flash state initialization.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbBgFlash_800209F4 changes with GObj_Create, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLinkMax, GObj_SetupGXLink, HSD_GObj_SetupProc

what_changed.text: Added JObj matrix/quaternion-related routines and helpers, including fn_80020AEC, lbBgFlash_80020E38, fn_8002113C, FakeHSD_JObjSetRotation, Fake_HSD_JObjGetRotation, IKChainData, and lbBgFlash_80021410 excerpted in the diff.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80020AEC matrix normalization and parent traversal
raw_diff: lbBgFlash_80020E38 angle clamp and quaternion/non-quaternion paths

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded 5 new matches: lbBgFlash_800206D4, fn_80021B04, lbBgFlash_800208EC, lbBgFlash_80021A18, and lbBgFlash_800209F4.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report '✅ 5 new matches'

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded improvements in fn_8001FEC4, lbBgFlash_80021410, lbBgFlash_80020E38, fn_80020AEC, fn_8002113C, fn_8001FC08, .sdata2, and .sdata.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report '📈 8 improvements in unmatched items'

smart_moves.text: Recovered color fields as GXColor and used named r/g/b/a channel accesses instead of the prior integer/byte field view, making the background flash color state more reviewable.
Kept offset comments in recovered structs, which helps reviewers check the reconstructed layout against known offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: BgFlashData and IKChainData fields include /* 0x.. */ comments

smart_moves.text: The author left an explicit TODO on fn_8001FC08 explaining that attempts to un-unroll the repeated channel code kept a loop in asm, preserving useful matching context rather than silently normalizing the code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8001FC08 comments 'TODO: Un-unroll this somehow?' and 'When I try it just stays a loop in the asm'

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering packed color state, replacing integer or byte-field stand-ins with GXColor can clarify channel semantics and call signatures, but the field typing should stay tied to concrete accesses and layout evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: BgFlashData x4/x8/xC changed to GXColor
raw_diff: lbBgFlash_800206D4 uses GXColor* col1/col2 and channel math

decomp_lessons.lesson: Repeated channel update code may look like a natural loop, but matching can force an unrolled form; if an unrolled form remains, record the failed loop attempt or reason in source comments.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8001FC08 four repeated channel blocks
raw_diff: TODO says un-unroll attempts stayed a loop in asm

decomp_lessons.lesson: For partially matched functions, bot score evidence can document progress without implying full source quality; PR #2313 had several functions improved but still below 100%.

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style names such as fn_8001FC08, fn_8001FEC4, fn_80020AEC, fn_8002113C, and lbl_80433658 were retained where stronger semantics are not shown in the PR evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: retained fn_ and lbl_ names throughout lbbgflash.c

naming_conventions.convention: Short role-based local names were used where the role is clear, such as data, flash, gobj1_slot, gobj2_slot, parent, cur, grandpar, axis, angle, max_angle, and min_angle.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local variables in lbBgFlash_800208EC, lbBgFlash_800209F4, fn_80020AEC, lbBgFlash_80020E38, fn_8002113C

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered struct names BgFlashData, BgFlashState, and IKChainData are semantic enough for local review while still keeping unknown fields as x-offset-style names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct BgFlashData with x4/x8/xC/x10/x20 fields
raw_diff: typedef struct IKChainData with jobj0/jobj1/pos0-pos4/len0/len1

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK in fn_8001FEC4, lbBgFlash_800209F4, and fn_8002113C to influence stack shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The loaded PR evidence has bot score output but no narrow objdiff explanation for each PAD_STACK use.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used scoped pragmas around lbBgFlash_800208EC: #pragma push, #pragma dont_inline on, and #pragma pop.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows lbBgFlash_800208EC reached 100%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No reviewer discussion or adjacent-function regression evidence is loaded for the pragma choice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted inline depth around JObj/math routines with #pragma inline_depth(1) before fn_80020AEC and #pragma inline_depth(8) before lbBgFlash_80020E38.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR slice does not include an explanation of why these inline depths were required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used fake_HSD_ASSERT and local FakeHSD_JObjSetRotation/Fake_HSD_JObjGetRotation inlines to reproduce jobj.h assert behavior and rotation access patterns.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Loaded standards prefer existing header inlines when identifiable; this PR evidence shows fake local inlines but not reviewer acceptance rationale.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used volatile f32 tmp in lbBgFlash_80020E38 during reciprocal-square-root length calculation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: volatile f32 tmp; tmp assigned from __frsqrte refinement result
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No explicit objdiff note explains the volatile local.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Preserved suspicious no-op conditionals such as if ((data && data) && data){} and if ((!HSD_GObj_804D784B) && (!HSD_GObj_804D784B)){} in the excerpt, likely as local codegen steering, but the PR evidence does not explain them.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Treat as matching-tactic evidence only, not accepted style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed GXColor recovery in lbbgflash
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2313 shows lbbgflash color state becoming more reviewable by typing BgFlashData color fields and related externs as GXColor, then using r/g/b/a channel accesses in initializers and updates.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Document failed loop cleanup when unrolled channel code remains
accepted_candidate_records.text: In fn_8001FC08, the author left a TODO noting that attempts to un-unroll the repeated channel logic stayed as a loop in asm. This is useful context when an unrolled form remains for matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8001FC08 TODO and repeated channel blocks

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify local fake header inlines/assert wrappers
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2313 used local fake_HSD_ASSERT plus FakeHSD_JObjSetRotation/Fake_HSD_JObjGetRotation wrappers for jobj.h-like rotation helpers. Existing standards already prefer header inlines and assert macros; curator may consider adding an example warning that local fake header helpers require explicit objdiff evidence and should be replaced by real header inlines when possible.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR provides a concrete historical example of local fake header helpers being used as a matching tactic, but the slice lacks enough rationale to mark it as accepted style.

source_update_candidates.title: lbbgflash.c contains background flash GX rendering and JObj/IK math routines
source_update_candidates.text: The PR evidence shows src/melee/lb/lbbgflash.c covering background flash GX quad rendering, GObj setup, color transition state, and JObj matrix/quaternion/IK-like helper routines.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for source navigation; should be checked against current source before promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not treat PAD_STACK, #pragma dont_inline, #pragma inline_depth, volatile locals, fake_HSD_ASSERT wrappers, or no-op conditionals from this PR as globally accepted style; the loaded evidence does not include per-tactic verifier rationale.
Do not infer that all functions in lbbgflash were fully matched; the bot report explicitly lists several functions as improvements below 100%.
Do not infer specific contents of src/melee/lb/lbbgflash.h beyond changed-file metadata because its diff was not loaded.
